BusInfos.Description: The master bus and the other bus groups used to turn on or off fx, music, ambiences or voices

GenericSounds.Description: Sounds that are not specific to a unique simulation.

DefaultCastleExteriorAmbienceSound.Description: Ambience switch applied when outside castle and also on open rooms

DefaultRoomAmbienceSound.Description: Ambience switch applied when inside castle in closed rooms

BoostActivatedSound.Description: When a consumable boost is activated

SellInventoryItemSound.Description: When selling items while gold storage is not full

TrashInventoryItemSound.Description: When selling items while gold storage is full

DyeAppliedSound.Description: When dye is applied on a piece of equipment

HeroVoicesSounds.Description: All the VO that a hero can trigger according to specific situations. A switch allows to change the content depending on the hero selected

CastleEntranceVo.Description: AI bark when drawbridge opens and hero enters castle

Vo.Description: AI bark when hero receives huge amount of damage on a single hit, calculated with the 'DamageHpThreshold'

DrinkPotionVo.Description: AI bark when hero drinks healing potion

PickUpLifeOrbVo.Description: AI bark when hero picks up life orb

InflictsCriticalDamageVo.Description: AI bark when hero inflicts huge amount of damage on a single hit

KilledVo.Description: AI bark when hero gets killed

ResurrectedVo.Description: AI bark when hero is revived

LowHealthVo.Description: AI bark when hero reaches low health threshold

BossAggroedVo.Description: AI bark when a Boss starts to move towards the hero

BossKilledVo.Description: AI bark when a Boss is killed

TreasureRoomDoorOpeningVo.Description: AI bark when the treasure room door opens and the chests are available to loot

InventoryIsFullVo.Description: AI bark when hero tries to pick up an item on the floor while inventory is full

AllMinesDestroyedVo.Description: AI bark when hero destroys the last mine of a castle during an attack

CannotUseSkillWhileStunnedVo.Description: AI bark when hero tries to cast a skill while being stunned

AllStorageChestsOpenedVo.Description: AI bark when chests are opened in the treasure room

PlacingBossCreatureVo.Description: AI bark when placing a boss in build mode

PlacingRoomVo.Description: AI bark when placing a room in build mode

CreatureUpgradedVo.Description: AI bark when upgrading a creature in build mode, currently applied on specialization change though

BuildingUpgradedVo.Description: AI bark when upgrading a building in build mode

MaxDefensePointReachedVo.Description: AI bark when trying to add defence and DP maximum has been reached in build mode

PurchasingGearVo.Description: AI bark when purchasing hero items

SellingGearVo.Description: AI bark when selling any item

EquipsGearVo.Description: AI bark when equipping hero gear

StorageChestsAreShieldedVo.Description: AI bark when the treasure room door opens and the chests are unavailable

LevelUpVo.Description: AI bark when hero levels up

AttackTimerReachedZeroVo.Description: AI bark when the attack timer reached 0

GeneralAttackSounds.Description: All sounds used during attack only.

AttackMusic.Description: Music switch played during standard attacks

AttackReportAmbienceSound.Description: Ambience switch played during attack report/victory screen

BossPveCastleAttackMusic.Description: Music switch played only when attacking PVE Boss castles

EpicFightAttackMusic.Description: Music played during a boss fight

TreasureRoomMusicOutOfTime.Description: Music played in treasure room when chests are not available to loot

TreasureRoomMusicInTime.Description: Music played in treasure room when chests are available to loot

AttackReportMusic.Description: Music played during attack report/victory screen

EpicWinJingleSound.Description: Music stinger played when a Boss is defeated

HeroDeathJingleSound.Description: Music stinger played when hero dies

DodgeSound.Description: When an attack is blocked instead of damaging a target

AbsorbedSound.Description: When an attack is absorbed instead of damaging a target

StunnedSound.Description: When an attack results in stunning a target

SpellResistSound.Description: TO BE REMOVED WITH ALL REFERENCES TO IT IF OBSOLETE

SnaredSound.Description: When an attack results in snaring a target

ConfusedSound.Description: When an attack results in confusing a target

LootCollectedSound.Description: When items are picked up after being dropped by creatures in attack mode

ChestLootCollectedSound.Description: TO BE REMOVED WITH ALL REFERENCES TO IT IF OBSOLETE

LootDroppedCoinsSound.Description: When gold coins are dropped from creatures in attack mode

LootDroppedLifeForceSound.Description: When Life force is dropped from creatures in attack mode

LootDroppedPremiumCashSound.Description: When Blings are dropped from creatures in attack mode if ever enabled

ChestLootDroppedSound.Description: TO BE REMOVED WITH ALL REFERENCES TO IT IF OBSOLETE

HeroItemDroppedSound.Description: When hero items are dropped from creatures in attack mode

ConsumableDroppedSound.Description: When dyes are dropped from creatures in attack mode until other consumables can drop we don't use a switch

CraftingMaterialDroppedSound.Description: When crafting material are dropped from creatures in attack mode until other consumables can drop we don't use a switch

LevelUpSound.Description: When the hero level up pop up appears

ChallengeCountDown3Sound.Description: When challenge HUD countdown displays the number 3

ChallengeCountDown2Sound.Description: When challenge HUD countdown displays the number 2

ChallengeCountDown1Sound.Description: When challenge HUD countdown displays the number 1

ChallengeCountDownEndSound.Description: When challenge HUD countdown displays GO

HudHeroVsHeroAnimSound.Description: Castle VS Castle HUD displayed when the drawbridge opens

InvalidActionFeedbackSound.Description: When invalid actions are performed based on Switch_Type_Impossible_Actions

TimerEndingCountdownSound.Description: When the attack timer reach TimerEndingCountdownDurationInSeconds

AttackTimerBonusSound.Description: When a bonus is added to the attack timer

AbilityActivatedSound.Description: TO BE REMOVED WITH ALL REFERENCES TO IT IF OBSOLETE

AbilityCooldownEndedSound.Description: When an ability cool down ends

LifeShieldActivationSound.Description: When runaway hero life shield is activated

LifeShieldDeactivationSound.Description: When runaway hero life shield is deactivated

CreatureDefendingATotemAggroedWarningSou.Description: When a creature defending a totem is aggroed

GeneralBuildSounds.Description: All sounds used for the build mode ONLY

BuiltEntityDropSound.Description: Switch used when dropping an entity in build mode

BuiltEntityPickupSound.Description: Switch used when picking up an entity in build mode

BuiltEntityDeleteSound.Description: Switch used when deleting an entity in build mode

BuiltEntityRotateSound.Description: Switch used when rotating an entity in build mode

BuiltEntityInspectSound.Description: When inspecting an entity in build mode

BuiltEntitySelectionSound.Description: Switch used when selecting an entity in build mode

BuiltEntityHarvestStartedSound.Description: When harvesting mines on the progress bar

BuiltEntitySnapSound.Description: Switch used when snapping an entity in build mode

HarvestDroppedGoldSound.Description: When gold drops after harvesting mines

HarvestDroppedLifeForceSound.Description: When Life Force drops after harvesting mines

HarvestDroppedPremiumCashSound.Description: When Premium Cash drops after harvesting mines

HarvestCollectedGoldSound.Description: When gold is collected after harvesting mines

HarvestCollectedLifeForceSound.Description: When Life Force is collected after harvesting mines

HarvestCollectedPremiumCashSound.Description: When Premium Cash is collected after harvesting mines

InvalidActionFeedbackSound.Description: TO BE REMOVED WITH ALL REFERENCES TO IT IF OBSOLETE

BuiltEntitiesGroupReplacedSound.Description: When a creature specialization is changed

PowerValidConnectionBeamStartSound.Description: When the energy ray of the power generator is activated using ALT

PowerValidConnectionBeamStopSound.Description: When the energy ray of the power generator is deactivated releasing ALT

PowerInvalidConnectionBeamStartSound.Description: When the energy ray of the power generator becomes unstable

PowerInvalidConnectionBeamStopSound.Description: When the energy ray of the power generator goes from unstable to stable

TotemValidConnectionBeamStartSound.Description: When the energy ray of the totem is activated using ALT

TotemValidConnectionBeamStopSound.Description: When the energy ray of the totem is deactivated releasing ALT

TotemInvalidConnectionBeamStartSound.Description: When the energy ray of the totem becomes unstable

TotemInvalidConnectionBeamStopSound.Description: When the energy ray of the totem goes from unstable to stable

TotemDefenderLinkingSound.Description: When the energy ray of the power generator becomes unstable

TotemDefenderUnlinkingSound.Description: When the energy ray of the power generator goes from unstable to stable

BuildingRepairingStartedSound.Description: When a mine repair progress bar starts

BuildingRepairingStoppedSound.Description: When a mine repair progress bar ends

AggroTweakingToolActivationSound.Description: When starting to set up creature aggro zone pressing ALT key

AggroTweakingToolDeactivationSound.Description: When stopping to set up creature aggro zone releasing ALT key

AggroTweakingToolConfirmationSound.Description: When setting up creature aggro zone with ALT key pressed and a mouse click to confirm

GeneralLobbySounds.Description: All sounds used for the home attack selection and region selection ONLY

LobbyMusic.Description: Music applied to the lobby, attack selection and region map screens

HomeAttackSelectionAmbienceSound.Description: Ambience switch applied to the lobby and attack selection

RegionSelectionAmbienceSound.Description: Ambience switch applied to the region map

AttackSelectionCastleHoveredSound.Description: When mouse hovering a region in the region map

AttackRegionUnlockAnimationSound.Description: When unlocking a new region in the region map

CastleSelectionMusic.Description: Music applied during the castle selection

CastleSelectionAmbienceSound.Description: Ambience applied during the castle selection

Music.Description: Music applied during castle visit mode - standard castle 1

AmbienceSound.Description: Ambience applied during castle visit mode - standard castle 1

Music.Description: Music applied during castle visit mode - standard castle 2

AmbienceSound.Description: Ambience applied during castle visit mode - standard castle 2

Music.Description: Music applied during castle visit mode - standard castle 3

AmbienceSound.Description: Ambience applied during castle visit mode - standard castle 3

Music.Description: Music applied during castle visit mode - unaffordable

AmbienceSound.Description: Ambience applied during castle visit mode - unaffordable

CastleSelectedSound.Description: Whoosh when zooming towards a castle

CastleUnSelectedSound.Description: Whoosh when zooming away from a castle

UserInterfaceSounds.Description: All the UI sounds mapped to a string id that will be used from the UI code

EquipClothSound.Description: When a cloth item is equipped or dropped in the inventory

EquipStaffSound.Description: When a staff is equipped or dropped in the inventory

EquipRingSound.Description: When a ring is equipped or dropped in the inventory

EquipNecklaceSound.Description: When a necklace is equipped or dropped in the inventory

EquipPetSound.Description: When a pet is equipped or dropped in the inventory

EquipCrossbowSound.Description: When a crossbow is equipped or dropped in the inventory

EquipLeatherSound.Description: When a leather item is equipped or dropped in the inventory

EquipSwordSound.Description: When a metallic weapon is equipped or dropped in the inventory

EquipArmorSound.Description: When a metallic piece of armour is equipped or dropped in the inventory

InventoryPickupSound.Description: When any item is picked up from inventory, this sound is generic

InventoryCancelPickupSound.Description: When an item pick up action is cancelled and also when removed from forge slots

NotificationSound.Description: When a generic notification occur, numbers in red circles in the UI

NotificationExclamationMarkSound.Description: TO BE REMOVED WITH ALL REFERENCES TO IT IF OBSOLETE

DisablePopupDuckingPreset.Description: TO BE REMOVED WITH ALL REFERENCES TO IT IF OBSOLETE

EnablePopupDuckingPreset.Description: TO BE REMOVED WITH ALL REFERENCES TO IT IF OBSOLETE

CastleLevelUpPopupSound.Description: TO BE REMOVED WITH ALL REFERENCES TO IT IF OBSOLETE

DisabledButtonPressed.Description: TO BE REMOVED WITH ALL REFERENCES TO IT IF OBSOLETE

TutorialPopUp.Description: TO BE REMOVED WITH ALL REFERENCES TO IT IF OBSOLETE

GenericButtonRollOver.Description: When generic roll over is done in the UI, usually paired with a visual highlight

VictoryAnimationJingleSound.Description: Music stinger that overrides general music when chests are opened within the treasure room

CastleValidationSuccessJingleSound.Description: Music stinger that overrides general music when chests are opened within the treasure room in case of a castle validation

InvalidInventoryActionSound.Description: May be used while trying to do an invalid action in the inventory

BuyShopItemSound.Description: When anything is bought in the game

AchievementCompletedSound.Description: Music and SFX stinger supporting the completion of any achievement

NewObjectiveSound.Description: When a new objective pop up appears

PickupAbilitySound.Description: When picking up an ability from the skill tree and skill bar

DropAbilitySound.Description: When dropping an ability anywhere else than on the the skill bar, cancelling the action

EquipAbilitySound.Description: When dropping an ability in the skill bar, equipping it

PickupPotionSound.Description: When picking up a potion from the inventory, but this string should be removed so it uses the generic pick up sound

DropPotionSound.Description: When dropping a potion in the inventory, but this string name could be more consistent with other equip sounds

WindowCloseButtonSound.Description: When a window is closed with the X or when using a BACK button

AchievementDefenseWonSound.Description: When a pop up appears to tell that a hero was killed in your castle

AchievementDefenseLostLootedSound.Description: When a pop up appears to tell that a hero has beaten your castle and your chests were looted

AchievementDefenseLostShieldedSound.Description: When a pop up appears to tell that a hero has beaten your castle but your chests were not looted

RankingUpdateDownPopupSound.Description: When a pop up appears to tell that your ranking status downgraded

RankingUpdateSamePopupSound.Description: When a pop up appears to tell that your ranking status remained the same

RankingUpdateUpPopupSound.Description: When a pop up appears to tell that your ranking status upgraded

ClaimChallengeRewardSound.Description: TO BE REMOVED WITH ALL REFERENCES TO IT IF OBSOLETE

FirstHeroSelectionSound.Description: When a hero selection is highlighted as the player needs to choose his first hero in the NUE

ValidationStartSound.Description: When castle validation header appears as you start your castle's validation

ValidationFailedSound.Description: When castle validation failed pop up appears after the hero died in his own castle

CraftingDisplaySound.Description: When crafting button is highlighted to show it is available

CraftingClickSound.Description: When crafting button is clicked to start crafting items

CraftedItemReadySound.Description: When in or out of crafting menu and the crafted item cooking ends

ClaimCraftedItemClickSound.Description: When a crafted item is reclaimed

UniversalDropAnimatedCoinSound.Description: When the universal drop coin animation starts

DropDyeSound.Description: When dyes are dropped in a slot of the inventory

DropCraftingMaterialSound.Description: When crafting material are dropped in a slot of the inventory

InventoryDropCreatureSound.Description: When creature are dropped in castle inventory

InventoryDropTrapSound.Description: When trap are dropped in castle inventory

InventoryDropRoomSound.Description: When room are dropped in castle inventory

ObjectiveComplete.Description: When objective popup appear and objective is completed

CastleSelectionSelectCastleSound.Description: When a castle is clicked in the attack selection screen

CastleSelectionPanelPopupSound.Description: When the castle panel pops up in the attack selection screen

CastleSelectionAttackConfirmationSound.Description: When the confirmation button is pressed to proceed to a castle attack in the attack selection

VoiceOverSounds.Description: All the VO sounds used in game - need to migrate the NUE VO here in the future

AttackImpactSoundsSettings.Description: All settings and sounds used to determine and play the appropriate attack impact sounds

ReflectedDamageImpactSound.Description: When an attack results in damage reflection to the source

CriticalHitImpactSound.Description: Additional impact sound played on critical hits
